_note: Updated daily at noon by the design agent. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Making it obvious whether you're placing or selecting things in the room editor
priorities.note: Right now it's easy to accidentally move things when you meant to place new ones, or vice versa. This causes layouts to get corrupted. Fixing the visual cues so the current mode is always clear.

priorities.title: Writing down the rules for animations and AI panel behaviour
priorities.note: Without documented rules, things end up looking slightly different every time. Getting these written down prevents inconsistency creeping in.

priorities.title: Checking the tools for design inconsistencies — wrong colours, spacing, etc.
priorities.note: A pass through the styles to find anything that doesn't follow the design system.

priorities.title: Making sure everything works with a keyboard and meets accessibility standards
priorities.note: Focus order, keyboard navigation, and visible focus rings on all the new panels being built in the room editor.

priorities.title: Automated screenshots to catch accidental visual regressions
priorities.note: Would let us catch visual breakage automatically. Low priority until the tool is more stable.
